text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeeaaaaah! Everyone was so radiant! To! The!
MAX!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo happy I was able to have a serious match
with other Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And on top of that, I took first place! I must accept my victory with g-g-g-grace!
choice_data_list: Let's do it again next race too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And on top of that, I took first place! I must accept my victory with g-g-g-grace!
choice_data_list: Let's do it again next race too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Y-y-y-y-y-you can't mean that! I'm
supposed to be invisible like air...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You should be focusing on the amazing
performances the other racers put on!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know that... but... the other runners are
far more incredible than me, no matter how you
look at it. So...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It... It just doesn't feel right getting compliments!
You know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm gonna get much, much stronger so I can
win the next one just like this time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then, the races will keep heating up, and I'll
be right on the frontlines to see my favs in all
their glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-which basically means... there's still more in
store for me! True ecstasy awaits!
